name_cn:
MiuMiu New Vivant Handbag
Caramel 🤎 Regular Size
Fine leather paired with exquisite lock details, outstanding texture
Versatile and stylish, easily creating your own personal look
Slightly larger than the small size, with upgraded capacity 🌟
Suitable for commuting, outings, and dates, balancing aesthetics and practicality
✔️ Top handle
✔️ Detachable and adjustable shoulder strap
✔️ Zipper closure
✔️ White steel hardware
✔️ Detachable charm with metal lock
✔️ Blended lining with zipper pocket and slip pocket
Regular Size
🔍Size:32*19.5*11cm
📌Model:5BB199M1480
